holdings.infoBox: USMF is an equity ETF with a total of 201 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 4.07%, NVIDIA at 3.92%, Apple at 3.78%, Broadcom at 1.70%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 1.26%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. Multifactor Fund (USMF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree U.S. Multifactor index. The fund tracks an index of 200 US-listed equities. Stocks are selected and weighted by a combination of investment factors. USMF was launched on Jun 29, 2017 and is issued by WisdomTree.
